title: Ecuador vs. el resto del mundo
original_title: Ecuador vs. el resto del mundo
overview: November 7th, 2001. After a seventy years absence, the Ecuadorian national soccer team is close to qualifying for the first time to a Soccer World Cup. This documentary follows the events that took place during that historic date, when a whole country lived under the shadow of a soccer game.
